{{CargoRelic
|name=Goldberg Variations
|class_id=21651
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Bach’s mathematical lullaby. Aria and 30 mutations that Glenn Gould made immortal.
|fame=37
|art=73
|fth=45
|civ=47
|tech=41
|ss1=Protomon Snail assist DMG + 240<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +72<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss2=Protomon Snail assist DMG + 320<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +96<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss3=Protomon Snail assist DMG + 400<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +120<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss4=Protomon Snail assist DMG + 560<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +168<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss5=Protomon Snail assist DMG + 720<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +216<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss7=Protomon Snail assist DMG + 720<br>Per 5 ART Relics awakened, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +216<br>ART Relics Awakened: 100/100<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 560 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Green Card Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +300
}}
